metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "almaMater":
              return f"graduated from {obj}"
  >>>>>>> REPLACE
          if p == "almaMater":
              return f"graduated from {obj}"
  >>>>>>> REPLACE
with:
  <<<<<<< SEARCH
          if p == "operator":
              return f"operated by {obj}"
  =======
          if p == "operator":
              # This will be incorporated into mission descriptions; skip standalone sentence
              return ""
Change 2: Replace:
  # Group triples by subject
      from collections import defaultdict
with:
  # Build a lookup for mission operators to enrich mission descriptions
      mission_operator = {}
      for t in triples:
          if t.predicate == "operator":
              mission_operator[t.subject] = t.object.strip().strip('"')
      # Group triples by subject
      from collections import defaultdict
Change 3: Replace:
  if p == "mission":
              # Assume subject is an astronaut; describe crew membership in the mission
              return f"was a crew member of {obj}"
with:
  if p == "mission":
              # Assume subject is an astronaut; describe crew membership in the mission,
              # optionally include operator info if available
              op = mission_operator.get(obj)
              if op:
                  return f"was a crew member of the {op}-operated {obj}"
              else:
                  return f"was a crew member of {obj}"
Change 4: Replace:
  if p == "partsType":
              return f"is {obj}"
with:
  if p == "partsType":
              # Example: "List of counties in Texas" -> "is a county in Texas"
              low = obj.lower()
              if "county" in low:
                  # extract location after 'in '
                  loc = ""
                  if " in " in low:
                      loc = obj.split(" in ", 1)[1].strip()
                  return f"is a county in {loc}" if loc else "is a county"
              return f"is {obj}"
Change 5: 'if desc.startswith("__FULL__"):' to 'if desc.startswith("__FULL__"):'
Change 6: Replace:
  if not partials:
with:
  # Skip empty descriptors (e.g., operator handled elsewhere)
              if not partials:
Change 7: Replace:
  if not partials:
              # Only full‑sentence descriptors were added, or no descriptors at all
with:
  if not partials:
              # Only full‑sentence descriptors were added, or no descriptors at all
Change 8: 'if len(partials) == 1:' to 'if len(partials) == 1:'
